source: presentation layer recovered from the 48K image

terrain_attribute_table.note: paper/bright taken from terrain; mostly PAPER 6 (desert yellow), ink varies for features

side_ink_table.note: code masks AND 7 -> British blue, German black, Italian magenta (historic Spectrum colours)

draw_model: cell attribute = (terrain paper/bright from 0xD80E[cellbyte]) | (side ink from 0xCAC5[side] & 7); unit counter symbol = UDG chosen by unit type (special codes 13/14/15) via 0x694B
